calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Seth Skootsky appearing for trustee. Counsel stated that the declaration he filed this morning answered all the questions. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (25-35 Dolores Street. S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for conservator in 281166. Seth Skootsky appearing for trustee in 286945. Each case has a 50% interest in the property. Sale is confirmed for $6,500,000.00 for 100% interest. The conservator is authorized to deposit sale proceeds with facilitator for 1031 exchange. Counsel to prepare order. Bond is not required in the trust. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Have Proposed Action Taken Re Real Property Known As 25-35 Dolores, San Francisco
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order

Petetition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
